project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: RunningHub Generated Clip Review Prep
scope: prepare a local review package for the four generated RunningHub clips from R3-9D
summarize generated_clip artifacts, local mp4 paths, ffprobe results, source keyframe references, and prompt context
create a human review table with accept, reject, and regenerate_requested decision fields
do not call providers, regenerate clips, assemble final video, or mark review decisions
goal: Prepare the human review surface for the four RunningHub-generated clips without changing review state or calling providers.
acceptance: R3-9D live result report is parsed and referenced as the source of truth.
Review package includes exactly 4 generated clips unless the source report is inconsistent.

Each review entry records shot_id, generated artifact_id, local mp4 path, ffprobe status, duration summary, source storyboard image artifact, source keyframe path, prompt summary, and review decision placeholders.
Review decision placeholders include accept, reject, regenerate_requested, notes, and reviewer fields without preselecting a decision.
Package includes instructions for the next human review step without modifying app review status.

Report records network_call_attempted=false, runninghub_called=false, runway_called=false, provider_credits_consumed=false, real_video_generated=false, regeneration_performed=false, final_assembly_performed=false, secret_values_exposed=false.
No provider call, regeneration, batch expansion, final assembly, source overwrite, secret output, raw provider payload recording, signed URL recording, push, tag, release, or deploy occurs.
validation: JSON/YAML parse for generated review package report
boundary_or_safety_stop: review prep only completed; no provider call, review decision mutation, regeneration, final assembly, or deployment occurred
safe_actions_completed: Parsed R3-9D live result report and R3-9C authorization prep report.
Generated a local JSON review package for 4 RunningHub generated clips.
Generated a Markdown human review table with accept, reject, regenerate_requested, reviewer, and notes placeholders.
Confirmed 4 generated_clip artifacts have local MP4 files and ffprobe PASS.
Did not mutate app review state or call any provider.
options_for_jenn: Open the Markdown review table and local MP4 paths to decide accept, reject, or regenerate_requested per clip.
Review decisions, regeneration, and final assembly should be separate scoped tasks.
next_safe_option: Promote a local review-decision task after Jenn chooses per-clip decisions.
